subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Divine Covenant! That which hath been written by the Pen of constancy upon the Tablet of steadfastness was beheld [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الهی آنچه از خامه ثبوت بر صفحه رسوخ تحریر گشته بود ببصر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant
